items.title: In their 5th and final Summer League game, the #Magic are without Jase Richardson, Noah Penda, Alex Morales and Colin Castleton vs. Boston. All have played plenty in Las Vegas.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
In their 5th and final Summer League game, the #Magic are without Jase Richardson, Noah Penda, Alex Morales and Colin Castleton vs. Boston. All have played plenty in Las Vegas.

Orlando started TyTy Washington Jr., Lester Quinones, Philip Wheeler, Keon Johnson and Will Baker.

items.title: The #Magic will once again start Jase Richardson, Lester Quinones, Alex Morales, Noah Penda and Colin Castleton for today’s Las Vegas Summer League game against the Heat.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt: The #Magic will once again start Jase Richardson, Lester Quinones, Alex Morales, Noah Penda and Colin Castleton for today’s Las Vegas Summer League game against the Heat.
